---
title: "Aave Rates Analysis & TWAR Decision"
author: "Yevhen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(runner)
library(knitr) # For nice tables

DB_PATH <- "~/Documents/GitHub/rate-dashboard/aave_rates.db"
BLOCK_TIME <- 12

# Custom Theme
theme_rld <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#050505", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#050505", color = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "#9ca3af"),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#333333"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

```{r}
con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), DB_PATH)
df <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM rates ORDER BY timestamp ASC")
dbDisconnect(con)

rates <- df %>%
  mutate(date = as_datetime(timestamp), apy = as.numeric(apy)) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  filter(date >= (now() - months(6))) %>%
  distinct(timestamp, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(dt = as.numeric(timestamp - lag(timestamp, default = first(timestamp)))) %>%
  mutate(wt_apy = apy * dt) # Pre-calc for optimization

print(paste("Rows loaded:", nrow(rates)))
```

```{r}
# Gap Check
gaps <- rates %>% filter(dt > 24)
print(paste("Gaps > 24s:", nrow(gaps)))

# Outlier Check
Q1 <- quantile(rates$apy, 0.25); Q3 <- quantile(rates$apy, 0.95)
lower <- Q1 - 1.5 * (Q3 - Q1); upper <- Q3 + 1.5 * (Q3 - Q1)
rates <- rates %>% mutate(is_outlier = apy < lower | apy > upper)
print(paste("Outliers:", sum(rates$is_outlier)))
```

```{r}
# Define all windows to test (in seconds)
# 1-10 mins, 20 mins (100 blocks), 60 mins (1 hour)
windows_test <- c(
  setNames(seq(60, 600, 60), paste0(1:10, "m")), # 1m to 10m
  "20m (100blk)" = 100 * BLOCK_TIME,             # 1200s
  "1h" = 3600                                    # 3600s
)

results_list <- list()

print("Running Decision Matrix...")

for(w_name in names(windows_test)) {
  w_secs <- windows_test[[w_name]]
  
  # Fast Calc
  sum_wt <- runner(x = rates$wt_apy, k = w_secs, idx = rates$timestamp, f = sum)
  sum_dt <- runner(x = rates$dt,     k = w_secs, idx = rates$timestamp, f = sum)
  twar_val <- sum_wt / sum_dt
  
  # Calculate Deviation Stats
  devs <- abs(rates$apy - twar_val)
  n_volatile <- sum(devs > 1.0, na.rm = TRUE)
  pct_volatile <- (n_volatile / nrow(rates)) * 100
  
  results_list[[w_name]] <- tibble(
    Window = w_name,
    Seconds = w_secs,
    Violations = n_volatile,
    Risk_Percent = round(pct_volatile, 3)
  )
}

# Combine into final table
decision_table <- bind_rows(results_list)

# Display Table
kable(decision_table, 
      col.names = c("Window", "Duration (s)", "Rows > 1% Dev", "% Time in Danger Zone"),
      caption = "TWAR Smoothness vs. Lag Analysis")
```

```{r}
ggplot(decision_table, aes(x = reorder(Window, Seconds), y = Risk_Percent)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#22d3ee", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Risk_Percent, "%")), vjust = -0.5, color = "white", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Risk Analysis: Time Spent in >1% Deviation",
    subtitle = "Lower is safer (less lag). Higher means TWAR cannot keep up with volatility.",
    x = "Smoothing Window",
    y = "% of Time > 1% Deviation"
  ) +
  theme_rld
```

```{r}
# Calculate 100-block TWAR for final plot
w_100 <- 100 * BLOCK_TIME
s_wt <- runner(x = rates$wt_apy, k = w_100, idx = rates$timestamp, f = sum)
s_dt <- runner(x = rates$dt,     k = w_100, idx = rates$timestamp, f = sum)
rates$twar_final <- s_wt / s_dt

rates <- rates %>% mutate(is_volatile = abs(apy - twar_final) > 1.0)

ggplot(rates, aes(x = date)) +
  # Red Danger Zones
  geom_ribbon(data = subset(rates, is_volatile),
              aes(ymin = pmin(apy, twar_final), ymax = pmax(apy, twar_final)),
              fill = "#ef4444", alpha = 0.8) +
  # Lines
  geom_line(aes(y = twar_final, color = "100-Block TWAR"), size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(y = apy, color = "Spot"), size = 0.3, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spot" = "#22d3ee", "100-Block TWAR" = "#f472b6")) +
  labs(
    title = "Final Choice: 100-Block Smoothing",
    subtitle = paste0("Red zones indicate deviations > 1% | Window: ", w_100, "s"),
    y = "APY (%)", x = "Date"
  ) +
  theme_rld
```
